title: Partner Reunification Visa (Family Reunification)
summary: Your partner can join you in the Netherlands through the family reunification process. This applies to registered partners and spouses. The sponsor must have a valid residence permit, and the process takes 3-6 months through the IND.
steps: Sponsor applies for a sponsorship declaration (Machtiging) from the IND
Sponsor uploads required documents to IND portal
IND reviews and approves sponsorship (2-4 weeks)
Partner applies for provisional residence permit (MVV) at Dutch embassy in their country
Partner attends biometric appointment at embassy
Partner travels to Netherlands with MVV
Partner registers at municipality (Gemeente) within 5 days of arrival
Partner applies for residence card (verblijfskaart) at IND
documents: Proof of relationship (marriage certificate or registered partnership)
Criminal record certificate from partner's home country
office: IND (Immigratie- en Naturalisatiedienst) - Dutch Immigration Service
fee: €326 for MVV visa + €193 for residence permit
notes: Income requirement is waived for partners receiving Dutch benefits. The sponsor must have had residence for at least 1 year before sponsoring. If the sponsor is a Dutch citizen, the partner can apply directly for residence.
